steps.title: Use the frequency evidence
steps.content: The passage says corpora can test hypotheses about word frequency. The example says "life" is the ninth most commonly used noun, so the blank must mean very widespread or common.

steps.title: Pick the frequency word
steps.content: B relates to credibility, not frequency. C means declining, which conflicts with the high ranking. D means used incorrectly, but the passage does not discuss errors in usage. The needed word means found widely. The answer is A.
